lines.text_source: But saws and scissors can't compare to THAT.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas serrotes e tesouras não chegam perto DAQUILO.\n

lines.text_source: It's bigger than a human arm...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É maior que um braço humano...

lines.text_source: What the...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas que...

lines.text_source: What... is THAT!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que... é AQUILO!?

lines.text_source: Whatever it is, it's definitely insectoid.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Seja lá o que for, é definitivamente um inseto.

lines.text_source: But... this thing doesn't look like any bug\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas... essa coisa não parece nenhum inseto\n

lines.text_source: I've ever seen.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: que eu já vi.

lines.text_source: It's at least ten times... no, a hundred\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É no mínimo dez vezes... não, cem\n

lines.text_source: times bigger.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: vezes maior.

lines.text_source: What is... going on...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que está... acontecendo...?

lines.text_source: Revulsion wells up inside me, and my skin crawls.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A repulsa cresce dentro de mim, e minha pele se arrepia.\n

lines.text_source: I just want to look away from this thing.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Só quero desviar o olhar dessa coisa.

lines.text_source: What do I do...? What should I do...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que eu faço...? O que eu devo fazer...?

lines.text_source: Hh... Ah... Aaah--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Hn... Ah... Aaah--

lines.text_source: Without looking away, I jump off the cliffside\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sem desviar o olhar, salto do penhasco\n

lines.text_source: in front of me.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: à minha frente.

lines.text_source: I feel that unnatural sharpness cut through\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sinto aquele corte sobrenatural rasgar\n

lines.text_source: the air just behind me as I leap.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: o ar logo atrás de mim enquanto pulo.

lines.text_source: Aaaaah!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Aaaaah!

lines.text_source: I'm... flying!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Estou... voando!?

lines.text_source: For a moment, I'm soaring through the air.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por um momento, deslizo pelo ar.

lines.text_source: I feel myself hit the slope, and tumble down\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sinto-me bater na encosta e rolar\n

lines.text_source: the snowy cliffside.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: pela ladeira nevada.

lines.text_source: Guh--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Agh--

lines.text_source: My back hits the ground hard. The impact knocks\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Minhas costas batem com força no chão. O impacto\n

lines.text_source: the wind out of me, and I choke.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: me tira o fôlego, e eu engasgo.

lines.text_source: Urgh... Ghh...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Argh... Ghh...

lines.text_source: Ghh!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Agh!

lines.text_source: My body's screaming in agony, but I don't have\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Meu corpo grita de dor, mas não tenho\n

lines.text_source: time. I stagger to my feet and start running.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tempo. Cambaleio de pé e começo a correr.

lines.text_source: What was that, what was that, what was that...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que era aquilo, o que era aquilo, o que era aquilo...

lines.text_source: WHAT THE HELL WAS THAT!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: QUE DIABOS ERA AQUILO!?

lines.text_source: An insect that massive doesn't exist...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Um inseto tão imenso não existe...\n

lines.text_source: There's no way it COULD exist!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Não tem como existir!

lines.text_source: So this has to be a dream! That was all just\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Então isto só pode ser um sonho! Aquilo foi tudo\n

lines.text_source: some illusion!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: uma ilusão!

lines.text_source: I just have to turn and look... and I'll see\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Basta eu me virar e olhar... e vou ver\n

lines.text_source: everyone smiling, waiting for me--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: todo mundo sorrindo, esperando por mim--

lines.text_source: And I look back.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: E olho pra trás.

lines.text_source: Aaaaaargh! I-I-I-It's gonna...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Aaaaargh! V-V-V-Vai...\n

lines.text_source: It's gonna EAT me!!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Vai me DEVORAR!!

lines.text_source: I start zigzagging right and left, serpentine,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Começo a ziguezaguear pra direita e esquerda,\n

lines.text_source: trying to keep it guessing.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tentando despistá-lo.

lines.text_source: Hh... hh... H-How far do I have to run!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Hh... hh... Q-Quanto eu ainda tenho que correr!?

lines.text_source: I-I can't... keep this up...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: E-Eu não... aguento mais...

lines.text_source: I keep running straight ahead. \n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Continuo correndo em frente. \n

lines.text_source: But...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas...

lines.text_source: Wha--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Quê--

lines.text_source: Something gives way under my heel.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Algo cede sob meu calcanhar.

lines.text_source: Aaaaaaaaagghh!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Aaaaaaaaagh!

lines.text_source: Ghh...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Argh...

lines.text_source: Agh... Did I fall again...? Everything... hurts...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Argh... Caí de novo...? Tudo... dói...

lines.text_source: I shade my eyes with my hand, peering up at the\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Protejo os olhos com a mão, espiando a\n

lines.text_source: light shining from above. Looks like a hole...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: luz que vem de cima. Parece um buraco...

lines.text_source: If that's where I fell from... Must've been\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Se foi de lá que caí... Deve ter sido\n

lines.text_source: a bush or something hiding it...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: um arbusto ou algo escondendo o buraco...

lines.text_source: It'll be tough, but if I climb the wall here,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Vai ser difícil, mas se eu escalar a parede aqui,\n

lines.text_source: maybe I can get back above ground...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: talvez consiga voltar pra superfície...?

lines.text_source: But even if I could get back up, that thing's\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas mesmo se eu subir, aquela coisa\n

lines.text_source: just going to eat me. So...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: vai só me comer. Então...

lines.text_source: Strangely enough, the walls are giving off\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Estranhamente, as paredes emitem\n

lines.text_source: a faint glow. It's dim, but it's helping me\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: um brilho fraco. É tênue, mas me ajuda\n

lines.text_source: see the place.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: a enxergar o lugar.

lines.text_source: It looks like some kind of cavern. There's a\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Parece algum tipo de caverna. Há um\n

lines.text_source: tunnel that seems like it goes on for a while.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: túnel que parece seguir por um bom tempo.

lines.text_source: Well, if I can't go up, then I might as well\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Bem, se não posso subir, é melhor\n

lines.text_source: go forward...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: seguir em frente...

lines.text_source: Still, even with this dim glow, I can't really\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ainda assim, mesmo com esse brilho fraco, não dá\n

lines.text_source: tell what it's like further inside.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: pra ver bem como é mais pra dentro.

lines.text_source: Maybe it'd be safer to just wait here quietly\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Talvez seja mais seguro só esperar aqui quieto\n

lines.text_source: after all...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: afinal...

lines.text_source: ...That noise... It's getting closer.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ...Aquele barulho... Está chegando mais perto.

lines.text_source: If I hang around here, it'll only hunt me down...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Se eu ficar por aqui, vai só me caçar...\n

lines.text_source: I can't stop now.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Não posso parar agora.

lines.text_source: With my decision made, I step forth into\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Decisão tomada, avanço para dentro\n

lines.text_source: the tunnel.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: do túnel.

lines.text_source: Rrrgh... Why is this happening to me!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Rrgh... Por que isso está acontecendo comigo!?

lines.text_source: Ngh, hah... phew... hah...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ngh, há... ufa... há...\n

lines.text_source: I don't feel it... chasing after me...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Não sinto ela... vindo atrás de mim...

lines.text_source: I finally let myself sit, exhaustion and relief\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Finalmente me deixo sentar, exaustão e alívio\n

lines.text_source: settling in.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tomando conta.

lines.text_source: Hahh... I'm safe now... Th-This... should be\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Hã... Estou a salvo agora... I-Isto... deve ser\n

lines.text_source: far... enough...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: longe... o bastante...

lines.text_source: *Shudder*
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: *Calafrio*

lines.text_source: I cringe instinctively. A sudden chill,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Me encolho por instinto. Um frio súbito,\n

lines.text_source: unpleasantly familiar, runs down my spine.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: desagradavelmente familiar, desce pela espinha.

lines.text_source: My body freezes. I can't move, confronted\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Meu corpo congela. Não consigo me mexer, diante\n

lines.text_source: with something beyond understanding.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: de algo além da compreensão.

lines.text_source: Wh... Wh-Wh-Why...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Q... P-P-Por...

lines.text_source: Why is it HERE!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por que está AQUI!?

lines.text_source: The colossal insect is right in front of me.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto colossal está bem na minha frente.

lines.text_source: Did this thing set me up!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que essa coisa me armou!?

lines.text_source: But the specifics... don't really matter\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas os detalhes... já não importam\n

lines.text_source: anymore.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: mais.

lines.text_source: Urgh--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Argh--

lines.text_source: It happens in an instant. My back's to the\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Acontece num instante. Estou de costas pra\n

lines.text_source: wall, and any escape is blocked by its\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: parede, e qualquer fuga é bloqueada pelo\n

lines.text_source: sinuous body.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: corpo sinuoso dele.

lines.text_source: I... can't escape.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Eu... não tenho como fugir.

lines.text_source: It creeps forward warily, as if it's learned\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ele rasteja pra frente com cautela, como se\n

lines.text_source: its lesson from its failed attempts earlier.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tivesse aprendido a lição das tentativas falhas.

lines.text_source: It leans in, close enough to pull me in with\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ele se inclina, perto o bastante pra me agarrar\n

lines.text_source: a single snap of its jaws... and stops.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: com um só estalo das mandíbulas... e para.

lines.text_source: *Drip*
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: *Pingo*

lines.text_source: Something like saliva is dripping from its jaws.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Algo como saliva pinga das mandíbulas dele.

lines.text_source: Is this... where I die...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É aqui... que eu morro...?

lines.text_source: Like this... in this senseless situation...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Assim... nesta situação sem sentido...\n

lines.text_source: eaten by whatever the hell this thing is...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: devorado por seja lá o que for essa coisa...

lines.text_source: The insect's jaws finally click open, gaping\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: As mandíbulas do inseto enfim se abrem, escancaradas\n

lines.text_source: to devour me.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: pra me devorar.

lines.text_source: I'm dead--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Estou morto--

lines.text_source: *Drip*... *Drip*... *Drip*...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: *Pingo*... *Pingo*... *Pingo*...

lines.text_source: The insect suddenly darts aside without biting\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto de repente se lança pro lado sem morder,\n

lines.text_source: me, like it's trying to escape something...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: como se tentasse escapar de algo...

lines.text_source: ...and something descends from far above,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ...e algo desce lá do alto,\n

lines.text_source: translucent and massive, as if to crush\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: translúcido e imenso, como que pra esmagar\n

lines.text_source: whatever's below.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tudo o que houver embaixo.

lines.text_source: It engulfs the massive insect effortlessly.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Engole o inseto colossal sem esforço.

lines.text_source: What... the...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas que...

lines.text_source: What is that...? Wh-What's... going on now...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que é aquilo...? Q-Que está... acontecendo agora...?

lines.text_source: I can see the insect writhing and thrashing,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Vejo o inseto se contorcendo e debatendo,\n

lines.text_source: trapped inside its slick, gelatinous body.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: preso dentro do corpo gelatinoso e viscoso.

lines.text_source: The insect was already beyond comprehension,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto já estava além da compreensão,\n

lines.text_source: but this thing... defies all reason. And...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: mas essa coisa... desafia toda lógica. E...

lines.text_source: It's melting...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Está derretendo...?

lines.text_source: This enormous insect's shell, hard as metal,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A carapaça desse inseto enorme, dura feito metal,\n

lines.text_source: is bubbling like it's being dissolved.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: borbulha como se estivesse sendo dissolvida.\n

lines.text_source: It's coming apart inside the slime.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Está se desfazendo dentro do limo.

lines.text_source: Is it... eating the...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que está... comendo o...?

lines.text_source: The insect struggles desperately inside this\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto luta desesperadamente dentro dessa\n

lines.text_source: amorphous creature, but its body is almost\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: criatura amorfa, mas o corpo dele está quase\n

lines.text_source: completely digested.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: completamente digerido.

lines.text_source: All I can do is stare blankly, still in shock.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Só consigo encarar, atônito, ainda em choque.

lines.text_source: The insect's face surfaces for an instant,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O rosto do inseto vem à tona por um instante,\n

lines.text_source: but it has no power left. The viscous red\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: mas não tem mais força. O vermelho viscoso\n

lines.text_source: swallows it up.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: o engole de vez.

lines.text_source: ...Am I... safe?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ...Estou... a salvo?

lines.text_source: I whisper, in sheer gratitude for still being\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sussurro, em pura gratidão por ainda estar\n

lines.text_source: alive.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: vivo.

lines.text_source: I... surviv--!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Eu... sobrevi--!

lines.text_source: I can't keep myself from letting out a cheer\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Não consigo conter um grito\n

lines.text_source: of relief... until I realize.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: de alívio... até perceber.

lines.text_source: The amorphous creature swells and heaves,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A criatura amorfa incha e se agita,\n

lines.text_source: a short distance away.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: a pouca distância.

lines.text_source: If it's somehow still hungry after that huge\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Se ainda estiver com fome depois daquele inseto\n

lines.text_source: insect, there's no reason it won't go for me\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: enorme, não há razão pra não vir atrás de mim\n

lines.text_source: next.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: em seguida.

lines.text_source: I need to get out of here, before--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Preciso sair daqui, antes que--

lines.text_source: The amorphous creature begins oozing forward...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A criatura amorfa começa a escorrer pra frente...\n

lines.text_source: towards me.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: na minha direção.

lines.text_source: It stops. Just waiting... like it's curious\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ela para. Só esperando... como se tivesse curiosidade\n

lines.text_source: to see what I do next.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: de ver o que faço em seguida.

lines.text_source: Ngh...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Nnh...

lines.text_source: Can it hear me? Is it going off vibrations in\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que me ouve? Será que sente vibrações\n

lines.text_source: the ground? Any sudden movements, and I'm dead.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: no chão? Qualquer movimento brusco, e eu morro.

lines.text_source: No motion. I keep perfectly still, holding\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sem me mexer. Fico perfeitamente imóvel, prendendo\n

lines.text_source: my breath.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: a respiração.

lines.text_source: Its viscous surface begins rippling...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A superfície viscosa começa a ondular...

lines.text_source: ...and little by little, reforms into a\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ...e aos poucos se remodela numa\n

lines.text_source: familiar shape.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: forma familiar.

lines.text_source: Wha--?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Quê--?

lines.text_source: My voice dies in my throat.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Minha voz morre na garganta.

lines.text_source: The face that appears before me is misshapen, glutinous,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O rosto que surge diante de mim é disforme, viscoso,\n

lines.text_source: horrifying... but unmistakably human.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: horrendo... mas inconfundivelmente humano.

lines.text_source: Unfocused eyes fixate on me. Its mouth gasps\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Olhos perdidos se fixam em mim. A boca arqueja\n

lines.text_source: and gapes soundlessly, like a fish drowning\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: e se abre sem som, como um peixe se afogando\n

lines.text_source: in air.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: no ar.

lines.text_source: What... are... you...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que... é... você...?

lines.text_source: Is it... trying to talk...? It just sounds\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que... está tentando falar...? Só soa\n

lines.text_source: like air escaping--I can't make out what\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: como ar escapando--não consigo entender o\n

lines.text_source: it's saying.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: que diz.

lines.text_source: By reflex or by curiosity, I move closer to\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por reflexo ou curiosidade, me aproximo pra\n

lines.text_source: hear what it's saying... and another voice\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ouvir o que diz... e outra voz\n

lines.text_source: rings out.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ressoa.

lines.text_source: Cover your eyes and ears!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Cubra os olhos e os ouvidos!

lines.text_source: The sharp command is followed by a cylindrical\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O comando ríspido é seguido por um objeto\n

lines.text_source: object bouncing on the stone between us.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: cilíndrico quicando na pedra entre nós.\n

lines.text_source: Looks like--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Parece--

lines.text_source: A grenade...? Gah!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Uma granada...? Gah!?

lines.text_source: I instinctively shut my eyes, and clap my hands\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por instinto, fecho os olhos e tapo\n

lines.text_source: over my ears.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: os ouvidos com as mãos.

lines.text_source: It's too bright to make anything out, but\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Está claro demais pra ver qualquer coisa, mas\n

lines.text_source: I feel the ground shake as if the creature's\n
lines.speaker: Man
